display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough journeys into the hidden world of forests, from the temperate rainforests of Canada, to the teak forests of India.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look into the lives of mammals and how they have adapted to their surroundings. The first episode features animals that thrive in the dark.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: A look at how mammals adapt to the changes humans have made to their environment.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: How air-breathing mammals have found remarkable ways to overcome the many challenges of a life in water, from freshwater jungle ponds to the dark depths of the open ocean.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: From ice-covered seas to snow-capped mountains, mammals have conquered the cold, living in the harshest places on earth thanks to their intelligence and adaptations.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the ways mammals survive the hottest places on earth, from camels storing water in humps to sijaka lemurs hugging trees.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals why forests are the ultimate test of survival for mammals, including a tiger who is put to the test in the heat of an Indian summer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul, Mick and Charlie are in Hull for one of their biggest ever collections. Dave takes a test drive in Tesla Model X and Derek is bowled over by a classic vintage mo.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewson family business starts a new era as Charlie heads off on his first solo collection, to pick up an Austin van from the North York Moors.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some very special working vehicles. Charlie feels the pull of a gargantuan Hummer and Paul extracts a vintage tractor from a Yorkshire barn.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: David Renwick's masterly comic creation, Victor Meldrew. Roger, Victor's cousin, accidentally invites the couple to his 60th birthday. Big mistake.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Why can't the Meldrews just have a nice pleasant day out? Naturally, a trip out on the river leads to epic complications for Victor and his long-suffering spouse.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: More great, dark comedy as the Meldrews are back from holiday and find that their neighbours Patrick (aka Angus Deayton) and Pippa have put their house on the market.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Charlie picks up an iconic 60s motor - a Ford Cortina Deluxe - and a 1970s Morris van brings a taste of Carry On Camping to Pickering.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Actress Charlie Hardwick shows Robson the hidden gems of the east Durham coastline while taking an art class on the sand and attending an outdoor singing session.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by author LJ Ross on a trip along the Northumbrian coast - they visit Holy Island, the setting for LJ's first novel, and sign up for a Nordic walking lesson.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a ghost town in Colorado, the remnants of an industrial enterprise in Puerto Rico, and a remote village on Cyprus.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a jungle refuge concealing a story of royal deceit, nuclear bunkers infiltrated by outsiders, and a haunted hospital marked by scandal.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van, and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Thunderbird / Citroen SM / Punto / BMW: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroen SM, and Dave admires a two-decade-old Punto with just 42 miles on the clock.

programme.title: The Men and the Machines That Beat Hitler
programme.desc: Mark Urban continues the story of men from the Fifth Royal Tank Regiment. This moving final episode covers D-Day, the battle for Normandy and eventual victory in Germany.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: Anglo-American relations toward the end of 1944 began to sour as the Allies fought in the conference chamber for the right to direct the final assault on Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts visit the North Yorkshire town of Scarborough, where finds include a carved tribute to a Spitfire pilot killed in action.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from Farnborough, Hampshire. Items include early designs for a flying machine and a letter written in the First World War trenches.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewson's advice on what to restore - he points to a 1992 Vauxhall Nova Merit Plus.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team restore a 1988 Golf GTI Convertible - an iconic hot hatch - along with a wooden launch boat and a catch-up with a Mk1 Austin Mini.

programme.title: The Men and the Machines That Beat Hitler
programme.desc: Mark Urban continues the story of men from the Fifth Royal Tank Regiment. This moving final episode covers D-Day, the battle for Normandy and eventual victory in Germany.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: Anglo-American relations toward the end of 1944 began to sour as the Allies fought in the conference chamber for the right to direct the final assault on Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts visit the North Yorkshire town of Scarborough, where finds include a carved tribute to a Spitfire pilot killed in action.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough journeys into the hidden world of forests, from the temperate rainforests of Canada, to the teak forests of India.

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: After King Harold's brother Tostig attacks the south coast, another enemy strikes when a vast Viking force lands in the north. Harold rushes to fight for his kingdom - and his life.

programme.title: Empire with Michael Portillo
programme.desc: Michael travels to India to uncover how the British East India Company - the world's first multinational corporation - raised a private army to create an empire.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewson's advice on what to restore - he points to a 1992 Vauxhall Nova Merit Plus.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team restore a 1988 Golf GTI Convertible - an iconic hot hatch - along with a wooden launch boat and a catch-up with a Mk1 Austin Mini.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Anna's family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: Discover the harsh reality of life in wild Alaska. The Alaskan summer must sustain the wildlife for the whole year, making it a season of frenzied activity.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: The fascinating nature series concludes. Faced with the winter's land freezes, raging storms and descending darkness, how will life hang on until the sun returns.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Anna's family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: Discover the harsh reality of life in wild Alaska. The Alaskan summer must sustain the wildlife for the whole year, making it a season of frenzied activity.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: The fascinating nature series concludes. Faced with the winter's land freezes, raging storms and descending darkness, how will life hang on until the sun returns.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Anna's family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: Discover the harsh reality of life in wild Alaska. The Alaskan summer must sustain the wildlife for the whole year, making it a season of frenzied activity.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: The fascinating nature series concludes. Faced with the winter's land freezes, raging storms and descending darkness, how will life hang on until the sun returns.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Anna's family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on nature's most amazing animals. This episode looks at the significance of large eyes in owls and giant squid.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have baffled us for centuries. This episode looks at how fleas jump and tracks the true speed of a cheetah.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have baffled us for centuries. This episode looks at two animals that use tools, orangutans and crows.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have fascinated us for centuries. This episode looks at the expandable bodies of anacondas and camels.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have fascinated us for centuries. A look at some species with unusual styles of consuming food.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines more creatures that have fascinated us for centuries. A look at some species with remarkable healing properties.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have fascinated us for centuries. A look at some species with remarkable regenerative powers.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on nature's most amazing animals. This episode looks at the significance of large eyes in owls and giant squid.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have baffled us for centuries. This episode looks at how fleas jump and tracks the true speed of a cheetah.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have baffled us for centuries. This episode looks at two animals that use tools, orangutans and crows.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Travelling from Plymouth to the Lizard, Michael Portillo investigates the first radio signal to be sent across the Atlantic.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to London's iconic Camden Town station - a labyrinthine junction on the Northern Line.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway begin their journey at South Kensington, home of Victoria and Albert Museum, the Science Museum and the Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway are heading to a stunning station you won't find on modern-day tube maps - Dover Street, now known as Green Park.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway embark on a night-time track walk to the abandoned station of British Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to London's iconic Camden Town station - a labyrinthine junction on the Northern Line.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway begin their journey at South Kensington, home of Victoria and Albert Museum, the Science Museum and the Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway are heading to a stunning station you won't find on modern-day tube maps - Dover Street, now known as Green Park.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway embark on a night-time track walk to the abandoned station of British Museum.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front, along with Mum and Dad, are in for a long night when they get held up by fugitive Speed and his gun-toting comrade MacTaggart.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front hire a private detective to prove Speed's innocence - but haven't they met them somewhere before.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is determined to save the Tooting he loves, but the stakes are high and he is soon forced to go on the run.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Chucklesome sequel to The Likely Lads. After five years apart, the old pals meet by chance. Terry returns to civilian life, while marriage looms for Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Brilliant 'buddy sitcom' from the early 1970s. Terry's return has been less than triumphant - his parents are away, it's cold and there's no food in the house.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front, along with Mum and Dad, are in for a long night when they get held up by fugitive Speed and his gun-toting comrade MacTaggart.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front hire a private detective to prove Speed's innocence - but haven't they met them somewhere before.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is determined to save the Tooting he loves, but the stakes are high and he is soon forced to go on the run.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Chucklesome sequel to The Likely Lads. After five years apart, the old pals meet by chance. Terry returns to civilian life, while marriage looms for Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Brilliant 'buddy sitcom' from the early 1970s. Terry's return has been less than triumphant - his parents are away, it's cold and there's no food in the house.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Wonderful web-slinging Marvel blockbuster starring Tom Holland and Robert Downey Jr. While Peter Parker tackles school, Spider-Man faces a new menace prowling the skies of New York City. (2017)

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: When Amy and Michael take Katie on a road trip to college, they pass a familiar campsite and decide to stop and hike the trail; the journey becomes harrowing when they discover an injured man. S2 E18

programme.title: Pam & Tommy
programme.desc: The tape falls into the hands of Penthouse publisher Bob Guccione; Tommy is concerned fame has passed him by. S1 E5

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: Helen reflects on her relationship with Elliot and finds herself drawn to the mysteries of the past. S2 E5

programme.title: Perfect Wife
programme.desc: Series Premiere: When young mother Sherri Papini vanishes a mile from her rural California home during a morning jog, all eyes are on her husband Keith. S1 E1

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran invites Maxwell to her family reunion at Niagara Falls hoping he'll feel romantic. S5 E10

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Buzz's Epic Little Missions
programme.desc: Buzz ventures into te taiaio to build a cool-as hut, goes off on a milking mission with the cows next door, explores some huge machines, and writes his very own rap!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The team is back and just as courageous, adventurous, humorous & obsessed with cases like before. They are joined by celebrities in their adventures and ghost hunts and in search of puzzles to solve.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Lu And The Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Navigating preschool life can be tricky! Lu the affectionate ladybird is used to getting her own way - but now, alongside her new classmates, she must learn what it means to be a good friend.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Curtis Stone kicks off Aussie Classics week. A once-in-a-lifetime chance for the cooks to have their dish stocked in Coles. They are challenged to whip up nostalgic Pie and Ice-cream flavours.

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Edina's weight problem becomes critical when she hears she is going to be visited by her reed-like model friend from the 60s. S1 E2

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: David comes clean. Tane texts his ex. Jo misreads the situation. Remi feels like a third wheel.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: New guides Karly and Bri join the gang in Northern India and Nepal, where they stay at an Ashram, frock-up at an Indian wedding, marvel at the Taj Mahal and see Mount Everest in Kathmandu.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes livid with Miss Hoover, and in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock sets out for deadly revenge. S21 E4

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things get complicated for Howard & Bernadette when Stuart starts bringing his new girlfriend home. Also, Penny & Leonard talk about starting a family while Raj explores an arranged marriage. S12 E3

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Eden fears a great loss. Mackenzie’s patience wears thin. David struggles to join the dots.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage ruins everything.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: With Curtis Stone back in the kitchen, and the MasterChef contestants are challenged with cooking a dish that heroes pork to save their place in the competition.

programme.title: Fear Factor: 48 Hours of Fear
programme.desc: Six new players must carry darkling beetles in their mouths, endure a spelling bee while covered by bees and wear shock collars all night to stay awake.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Season Finale: Bex and the team must hunt down escaped inmate Xander Wax, a killer with a knack for poisoning through unpredictable methods. S2 E13

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The five comics go undercover as they try to impress Greg Davies with their attempts at high-level espionage. Starring New Zealand's very own Rose Matafeo! S9 E9

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are brought in to solve the case of a recently murdered student whose death photo ends up trending on the Internet. S12 E17

programme.title: Family Massacre
programme.desc: Series Premiere: A family of four is found dead inside a partially burned Indiana home.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: The court urges Patty to show progress in the Tobin case or risk removal. Meanwhile, Ellen grows suspicious about a recent death and Tom faces the weight of personal financial loss. S3 E6

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy finds herself caught in the middle of a conflict between Cheyenne and her ex-convict mother, Brandi. S3 E11

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Buzz's Epic Little Missions
programme.desc: Buzz take us on a kayaking adventure, investigates what’s making a mysterious sound, and builds an epic obstacle course with the help of his dog Zion; but can he make it over the jump?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The team is back and just as courageous, adventurous, humorous & obsessed with cases like before. They are joined by celebrities in their adventures and ghost hunts and in search of puzzles to solve.

programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.desc: Navigating preschool life can be tricky! Lu the affectionate ladybird is used to getting her own way - but now, alongside her new classmates, she must learn what it means to be a good friend.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: With Curtis Stone back in the kitchen, and the MasterChef contestants are challenged with cooking a dish that heroes pork to save their place in the competition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage ruins everything.

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Forced to put their own troubles to one side, Robin and Harry seek a local policeman's help to track down Ollie. S1 E3

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
programme.desc: Join us for live coverage of the Final of the FIFA World Cup 2026 from the New York New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey. Teams to be confirmed.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Step Dave
programme.desc: 24-year-old bartender Dave meets Cara, the woman of his dreams - but finds she's 15 years older, and lives with her three kids and a scary mother-in-law. S1 E1

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ
programme.desc: It’s comedy legend Justine Smith, actor Rebekah Randell, and Warrior’s halfback Luke Metcalf against the mighty machine, battling it out for a $10,000 jackpot prize for their charity.

programme.title: What Not To Eat
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Tim and Kandi take a look at how strawberry milkshake is made and help Vicki and Rob from Scarborough tackle their instant noodle addiction.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the award-winning comedy panel show. Team captains Lee Mack and David Mitchell are joined by guest panellists Kadeena Cox, Ivo Graham, Harriet Kemsley and Eddie Marsan.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
programme.desc: Join us for coverage of the Final of the FIFA World Cup 2026 from the New York New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey. Teams to be confirmed.

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa
programme.desc: Nic and Pax encounter challenges traversing the treacherous bog environment in search for a rare and cryptic bird.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: An activist is mysteriously bludgeoned to death while chained to an excavator with his group during a protest.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth uncovers a dark secret when a contestant is murdered at a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The locals are unhappy when an ostentatious American opens a golf club near Kembleford - only for a body to turn up in the reeds.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Two Deaths of Hercule Flambeau: Following reports of Flambeau's death, the clerical sleuth races to protect a crown that contains a nail from the crucifixion of Christ.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown's past collides with the present when he investigates a missing person, a murder and a mythical wild cat.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown receives a visit from Chief Inspector Sullivan to inform him that Hercule Flambeau is on the run and wanted for a string of horrific killings.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a calypso singer's husband. Neville struggles with Sophie's revelations and contemplates his future in Saint Marie.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: When a warden is murdered in broad daylight, Sabrina and Zak find themselves navigating the world of the unhoused and on the trail of a possible spree killer.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown's past collides with the present when he investigates a missing person, a murder and a mythical wild cat.

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: When an amateur psychic's unsettling predictions for a grieving woman's future start to come true, Humphrey must uncover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Period drama series with the sleuthing cleric. Past and present collide when Father Brown investigates the macabre world of dollhouse crime scenes.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates when a body is dug up in the luau pit of a Hawaiian-themed hotel. Internal Affairs begins to question Grissom and Sara's return to the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara's investigation into charges against David Hodges heats up, and a video-game developer's body is found floating in a fountain before a gaming tournament.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part 1: When his aunt (Derry Girls' Siobhan McSweeney) foretells a dire fate, Crabtree leaves Effie at the altar. Murdoch investigates two murders at a cemetery.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part 2: Murdoch suspects Hart is hiding information about her dead father. Meanwhile, Brackenreid warns Watts that a PI is on his trail.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret asks Todd for help on a wrongful termination case. Tensions between Margaret and Gus simmer as they come across each other on a dating app.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is Canada's Sherlock Holmes in the mystery set in the 1900s. Murdoch meets magnificent men in their flying machines when a crash kills a man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult mystery set in 1900s Canada. When a soldier is slain with a sword, Murdoch's prime suspect is a hungover young man named Churchill.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a soap star about to make a return.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The CBI investigates the murder of a diamond cutter who was disembowelled with his own tools, while Patrick meets a girl who claims to be his daughter Charlotte.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Cook, The Chief, The Cop and His Lover: Charlie and Rex sniff out the suspects when the Chief Superintendent of the St. John's Police Department dies at a popular restaurant.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al suspect that a tabloid cameraman's death during a convenience-store robbery may be more than just a random act of violence.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A horse trekking expedition is cut short when Jack discovers the dead body of a rider in the most unexpected of places - the police station itself.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is Canada's Sherlock Holmes in the mystery set in the 1900s. Murdoch meets magnificent men in their flying machines when a crash kills a man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult mystery set in 1900s Canada. When a soldier is slain with a sword, Murdoch's prime suspect is a hungover young man named Churchill.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The CBI investigates the murder of a diamond cutter who was disembowelled with his own tools, while Patrick meets a girl who claims to be his daughter Charlotte.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Cook, The Chief, The Cop and His Lover: Charlie and Rex sniff out the suspects when the Chief Superintendent of the St. John's Police Department dies at a popular restaurant.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a soap star about to make a return.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: To help a former client whose life was destroyed by identity theft, Angie and Shade go undercover in the seemingly glossy world of speed dating to find a con artist.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A horse trekking expedition is cut short when Jack discovers the dead body of a rider in the most unexpected of places - the police station itself.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The crime drama marks its 100th episode as the team celebrates the Commissioner's 50 years in the job - only for an assassin to bring the party to a swift end.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A celebrity florist brings a dash of glamour to Kembleford, but also gains Father Brown's interest after the suspicious death of an angry neighbour.
